title: Security-Focused Review
description: Audit a change specifically for security vulnerabilities.
content:
Review this code for security issues only:

```
{{code}}
```

Check for: injection (SQL/command/template), broken authn/authz, secrets in code or logs, unsafe deserialization, SSRF, path traversal, missing input validation, and unsafe defaults. For each issue: the exploit scenario, severity, and the fix. If you find nothing exploitable, state what you verified rather than padding the list.
